channel.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Scripts

Clipboard

  • ClipBoardMonitor - Monitor clipboard changes, show tooltip of word count for text or a temporary GUI for pictures.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
Tools

(Use in) other programming languages

  • AutoHotkey.pystars14 - Write AutoHotkey scripts in Python - Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Forks

AutoHotkey_H

  • AutoHotkey_H - AHK_H adds functionality to original AutoHotkey and offers true multi-threading using NewThread() function or AutoHotkey.dll. Full list of v1 changes + Full list of v2 changes

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Networking

  • Chrome.ahkstars166 - by G33kDude - Automate Google Chrome using native AutoHotkey - Forum link
  • FTPstars2 - by jNizM - AutoHotkey wrapper for FTP Sessions (Class) - Forum link

    • Libraries

    ListBox

  • LBEXstars13 - by just me - a collection of utility functions for ListBoxes. Forum thread: link
  • TransparentListBoxstars11 - by just Me - Provides transparent listbox controls for AHK GUIs. Forum thread: link

    • Libraries

    Web

  • Neutronstars71 - by G33kDude - Set of tools for build HTML-based user interfaces with AutoHotkey. Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Mar 30th - Apr 5th, 2020
item.description:
Scripts

Window Management

  • Open-Show-Appsstars75 - Open, restore or minimize the desired Window's or Chrome's Apps. Forum thread: link

    • Libraries

    Database

  • AHKDbstars8 - by AHKDb - A database library for tab-separated data.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Tools

(Use in) other programming languages

  • ahkstars361 - A Python wrapper for AutoHotkey - Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jan 7th - Jan 13th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Memory

  • classMemorystars36 - by RHCP (Kalamity) - An AHK memory reading/writing class with pattern scans. Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Dec 10th - Dec 16th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Data Structures and Algorithms

  • Facadestars26 - by Shambles - A Set of Functional Programming Libraries. - Forum thread: link
  • HashTablestars9 - by Shambles - A Hash Table Implementation for AutoHotkey.
  • LibCryptstars46 - by different authors - A collection of crypting and encoding functions.
  • Type_Checkingstars4 - by Shambles - Type Checking for AutoHotkey - Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Nov 5th - Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Database

  • Leya - MySQL APIstars14 - by kevgk - Work with MySQL databases in autohotkey, without exposing server credentials to the client.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Integrated Development Environment

  • VSCode extension - Visual Studio Code (VSCode) plugin to add syntax highlighting for AutoHotkey.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Oct 8th - Oct 14th, 2018
item.description:
Scripts

Clipboard

  • CL3stars45 - A clipboard manager (text only) with plugins (Search, predefined Slots, ClipChain, FIFO, Editor and more). Forum thread link.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Sep 24th - Sep 30th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Data format

  • AHK_ctablestars7 - by hoppfrosch - Library to handle strings in tabular format - Forum thread: link.
  • CSVstars28 - by trueski/kdoske - Library to work with CSV files and Listview functions. Forum thread: link.
  • List manipulation functions - by Laszlo - Function library to manipulate comma delimited lists. Forum thread: link.
  • ObjCSVstars21 - by JnLlnd - Library to load/save CSV files to Objects and and Listview functions. Forum thread: link.
  • Tablestars5 - by VxE - Library to manipulate strings in tabular (TSV) format and Listview functions. Forum thread: link.
  • XAstars12 - by trueski/hi5 - Serialize/deserialize array to/from XML. Forum thread: link.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Sep 10th - Sep 16th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Graphics

  • AHKv2-GDIPstars56 - Update of the above GDI+ library compatiable with both AHK v1.1 and AHK v2 - Forum thread: link.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jun 11th - Jun 17th, 2018
item.description:
Scripts

Typing

  • KeyPress OSDstars136 - On-Screen Display which displays every key or mouse button press at a clearly visible text size. Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey May 14th - May 20th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Plotting (graphs, bars, charts and etc)

  • SVGraphstars7 - by CapnOdin - SVGraph bringing graphing and charting to AutoHotkey. Forum link
  • gdiChartLibstars8 - by nnnik - a gdip chart lib for autohotkey. Forum link

    • Scripts

    Window Management

  • Automatic Window Manager - Save and restore last window position for each process. Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Apr 30th - May 6th, 2018
item.description:
Scripts

Games

  • Achromatic - ProgressPlatformer - Platform game. Forum thread: link, GitHub: linkstars11
  • AHK Mahjong Solitaire - Mahjong game. Forum thread: link
  • F1 Racer - 2 or 4 player racing game. Forum thread: link
  • Infection - Board game. Also known as Ataxx. Forum thread: link
  • Ishido - Retro puzzle game. Forum thread: link, GitHub: linkstars2
  • ManyTetris - Multiple Tetris variants. Forum thread: link
  • Out of the Sea - Try to avoid being fished by evolving. GitHub: linkstars4
  • PABI Logical - Remake of the amiga game Logical. Forum thread: link, GitHub: linkstars2
  • Sudoku - Sudoku game and solver. Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jan 8th - Jan 14th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Integrated Development Environment

  • AutoGUI - AHK IDE with useful built-in plugins and GUI designer.

    • Tools

    Others

  • WinSpy - by Alguimist - Useful window spy / information tool written in AHK.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jul 31st - Aug 6th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

System

  • Vista Audio Control Functionsstars8 - by Lexikos - Provides alternatives to some SoundSet/SoundGet subcommands, as well as some additional features that SoundSet/SoundGet do not support. Forum thread: Link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jul 24th - Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Networking

  • WebSocket.ahkstars28 - by GeekDude - Class based WebSocket library - Forum link
  • Socket.ahkstars39 - by GeekDude - Socket library based on Bentschi's - Forum link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Apr 17th - Apr 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Tools

Others

  • AEIstars9 - by joedf - Displays AutoHotkey Environment Information and AHK support relevant System Information with a fancy update checker that auto-downloads with a progress bar. Forum thread: link.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

Others

  • iWB2 Learner - by jethrow - iWB2 Learner is a tool for gathering information about Internet Explorer webpages. Forum thread: link
  • AHK-EXE-Swapper - by evilC - Swap AHK version quickly! Forum thread: link.

    • Tools

    GUI WYSIWYG Builders

  • MagicBox - by Alguimist - MagicBox is a development tool to assist in the creation of message boxes. Forum thread: link.

    • Libraries

    Graphics

  • Particle Systemstars8 - by tidbit - A simple class to add particles to your GUI or onto your screen, using GDI+. Forum thread: link.

    • Libraries

    General

  • Class_ScrollGUIstars13 - by just me - Creates a scrollable GUI as a parent for AHK GUI windows. Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Mar 6th - Mar 12th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Joystick

  • JoystickWrapper - by evilC - Full event-based, 8 axis, 128 button, 4 POV joystick reading (C# DLL, Uses Lexikos' CLR).

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Feb 20th - Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Maths

  • Time() - by HotkeyIt - Count Days, hours, minutes, seconds between dates. Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

Interpreter

  • AutoHotkey build for CE - AutoHotkey for Pocket PCs / WinCE / Smartphones. Forum thread: link. Documentation link.

    • Tools

    Integrated Development Environment

  • Vim autohotkey-ahkstars14 - Vim plugin to add syntax highlighting for AutoHotkey.

    • Libraries

    Maths

  • calc() - math expression evaluation incl brackets.

    • Tutorials

    COM

  • MS Office COM Basics - Using AutoHotkey with MS Office.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Edit

  • Edit v2.0 - by jballi - Library for the lightweight and surprisingly powerful default Edit control for displaying and editing text. Forum thread: link

    • Scripts

    Maths

  • Unit Converter - unit converter that has most common English and scientific units and most common quantities from length to density to thermal conductivity. Also includes a section for physical and mathematic constants.

    • Tools

    Others

  • GoToTilla - Addon which allows jumping to tokens within AHK source code.

    • Libraries

    Networking

  • WinSCP.ahkstars12 - by Lipkau - Lib allows the use of WinSCP in AHK

    • Libraries

    General

  • CGUIstars14 - by ChrisS85 - An object-oriented GUI library for AutoHotkey. Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Dec 19th - Dec 25th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

Integrated Development Environment

  • Sublime 4 AutoHotkey - Sublime 4 AutoHotkey is a patch for Sublime Text text editor which adds support for AutoHotkey. - (discontinued)

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

Integrated Development Environment

  • vim-AHKcompletestars11 - Vim plugin to add auto-completion. (omni-completion)

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Nov 14th - Nov 20th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

(Use in) other programming languages

  • AutoHotkey.dll - Part of the AutoHotkey_H distribution. Load the autohotkey.dll from your other language, and pass normal AHK code to the dll file for execution. See here for a list of the exported functions. Some older links: python example, c/c++ example, forum link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

Combobox

  • CbAutoCompletestars11 - by Pulover - Auto-completes typed values in an AHK ComboBox. Forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey May 16th - May 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

ListView

  • LV_Rowsstars13 - by Pulover - Additional functions for AHK ListView controls. Forum thread: link

    • Libraries

    Maths

  • Evalstars18 - by Pulover - Evaluate expressions in strings. Forum thread: link

    • Tools

    (Use in) other programming languages

  • PYAHK - Documentation link.

    • Libraries

    Custom Controls

  • Rebarstars14 - by Pulover - AHK class for AutoHotkey Rebar custom controls. Forum thread: link
  • Toolbarstars23 - by Pulover - AHK Class for AutoHotkey Toolbar custom controls. Forum thread: link

    • Libraries

    Networking

  • Socket Class (überarbeitet) - by Bentschi - Class based sockets library. Supports TCP and UDP.

    • Libraries

    Plotting (graphs, bars, charts and etc)

  • BarChart - by Learning One - Library for making bar charts. Download link.

    • Scripts

    Mouse

  • Radial Menu - Powerful hotkey, launcher, mouse gestures system, and much more (skinable) - Forum thread: link

    • Scripts

    Typing

  • Lintalist - Searchable interactive lists to copy & paste text with plugins. Forum thread: link.

    • Scripts

    Window Management

  • WindowPadXstars196 - tool which provides some useful functionality within multi monitor environments. WindowPadX is an enhancement of WindowPad, originally released by Lexikos, see original forum thread: link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

ListView

  • LV_InCellEditstars11 - by just Me - In-cell editing for ListView controls. Forum thread: link

    • Tools

    Decompilers

  • AutoHotkey decompiler - for AHK 1.1+ Forum thread: link.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Mar 14th - Mar 20th, 2016
item.description:
Scripts

Filesystem

  • Belvederestars145 - sets up rules for taking actions on files (move, copy, delete, etc) based on the name of a file, its extension, size, age, and more. More info link.

    • Scripts

    Window Management

  • Min2Tray - Minimize window to tray & more. Forum thread: link

    • Tools

    (Use in) other programming languages

  • LibLua - Note: lua.ahk and lua_ahkfunctions.ahk can be found here.
  • PAHK - Forum thread: link.

    • Resources

    Websites

  • ahkscript.org - Official website of AutoHotkey Foundation LLC, a non-profit LLC (Limited Liability Company) founded for this software. Certificate of Organization (pdf) link.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2016
item.description:
Scripts

Window Management

  • SnapX - Enhances Windows/Aero Snap by taking over its hotkeys (Win+Left/Right, etc) and providing more fine-grained control over snap location and size. Works with multiple monitors, resolutions, and DPI levels.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

Networking

  • AHKsockstars53 - by TheGood - Function based sockets library. Supports TCP. Forum link
  • AHKhttpstars62 - Basic HTTP Server. Forum link

    • Scripts

    Maths

  • Monster - evaluate math expressions in strings (calculator).

    • Scripts

    Typing

  • Half-QWERTY - One-handed Typing. Using the space bar as a modifier, the user can generate the characters of either side of a full-sized keyboard using only one hand. More information via Forum thread: link
  • Thumbscript - Allows you to type using the number pad, with only 2 number presses for every letter. Documentation: link
  • AutoCompletestars133 - Suggests and completes words as you type. Forum thread: link.
  • Portable Keyboard Layout - helps people to learn better, more efficient keyboard layouts such as Dvorak, Colemak or Asset. Forum thread: link.
  • TypingAid - Suggests and completes words as you type. Forum thread: link GitHub linkstars90.

    • Libraries

    Clipboard

  • WinClip - by Deo - WinClip is a clipboard manipulation class extending AutoHotkey's clipboard capabilities including support for RTF, HTML and images. Forum thread: link.

    • Libraries

    Console

  • AHKonsolestars24 - by G33kdude - Class based AutoHotkey library for console support. This library enables you to create an object representing a console to interact with, as well as multiple console buffer objects to facilitate in double buffering. Forum thread: link.
  • LibConstars49 - by joedf - AutoHotkey Library For Console Support. This library enables you to write console applications and interact with other console instances. Basically, this library facilitates anything that has to do with writing and interacting with consoles. Forum thread: link.

    • Libraries

    Data format

  • AutoHotkey-JSONstars151 - by cocobelgica - JSON lib for AutoHotkey. Forum thread: link.
  • ObjDump/ObjLoad - by HotKeyIt - Serialize/deserialize object to/from variable/memory.
  • SerDesstars8 - by cocobelgica - Serialize / de-serialize an AutoHotkey object structure. Forum thread: link.

    • Libraries

    Database

  • ahkDBAstars48 - by IsNull - An OOP-SQL database access framework. Forum thread: link.
  • Class_SQLiteDBstars69 - by just Me - AHK SQLite API wrapper class. Forum thread: link.

    • Libraries

    Filesystem

  • FileGetProperties - by kon - Functions for retrieving extended file properties.

    • Libraries

    Graphics

  • GDIpstars98 - by tic - Full featured library that helps in interaction with Microsoft's gdiplus.dll - Forum thread: link.
  • GDIp_ImageSearch - by tic - Library using gdiplus.dll for searching image instances on the screen. See the end of that thread for MasterFocus' improved version, or see his GitHub repo here
  • Simple GDI class - by GeekDude - A class aiming to make using low-level GDI functions simple.

    • Libraries

    General

  • AutoXYWH - by tmplinshi - Move and resize controls automatically when a GUI is resized.
  • TaskDialogstars8 - by just Me - enhanced MsgBox for Win Vista+ - link
  • OnWin - by cocobelgica - Call function on window event (WinWaitXXX async). Forum thread: link

    • Libraries

    ListView

  • LV_Colorsstars18 - by just Me - Individual background and/or text colours for a GUI ListView's cells or rows. Forum thread: link
  • LV_EXstars10 - by just me - Some additional functions for AHK GUI ListView controls. Forum thread: link

    • Libraries

    Menu

  • [Lib] Menu - by just me - Some functions related to AHK menus. Forum thread: link

    • Libraries

    Hotkeys

  • CHotkeyControl - by evilC - Replacement for AHK hotkey GuiControl that supports mouse buttons etc (Partially mature).
  • HParse - by Avi - Function to convert meaningful shortcuts (Ctrl+X) to AutoHotkey syntax (^x).

    • Libraries

    Joystick

  • CvJoyInterface - by evilC - Control a vJoy virtual joystick using AHK.
  • XInput - by Lexikos - Read XBOX gamepads using XInput (Only way to independently read L/R triggers), control rumble motors.

    • Libraries

    Maths

  • Scientific Maths - by Avi - Library facilitating high precision mathematics.

    • Libraries

    Plotting (graphs, bars, charts and etc)

  • Excel Charts - by Xx7 - Library for creating a graph in Excel, save the graph as an image and display it in a GUI.
  • XGraph - by SKAN - Function library for graphically plotting real time data.

    • Libraries

    System

  • RunAsTask - by SKAN - Auto-elevates script without UAC prompt.

    • Libraries

    Text manipulation

  • String Things - by tidbit - Stand-alone string manipulation functions.
  • TFstars90 - by hi5 - Functions for manipulation of text files such as *.txt, *.ahk, *.html, *.css etc and Strings (or variables). Forum thread: link.

    • Scripts

    Clipboard

  • Clipjump - is a Multiple-Clipboard management utility for Windows. Source code: GitHubstars311. Forum threads: link 1, link 2.

    • Scripts

    Graphics

  • Fun with GDIPlus - Interesting GDI+ examples.

    • Scripts

    GUI

  • Examples of Non-Standard GUIs (ActiveX, GDI, etc.) - Examples of GUIs using non-standard methods to produce beautiful user interfaces.

    • Scripts

    Mouse

  • EitherMouse - Multiple mice, individual settings, auto swap mouse buttons on second mouse. Forum thread: link.

    • Scripts

    Window Management

  • bug.nstars2.6k - Tiling Window Manager. Forum thread: link

    • Tools

    Interpreter

  • AutoHotkey - AutoHotkey interpreter installer and binaries.
  • AutoHotkey DLLstars45 - AutoHotkey.dll opens the world of AutoHotkey to other programming and scripting languages. Forum thread: link. Documentation link.

    • Tools

    Debugging

  • [Class] Console - This class is meant to simplify debugging for scripts from simple text handling, to outputting and logging data & arrays. GitHub linkstars19.
  • Print Array - Function that prints array content in GUI.

    • Tools

    Decompilers

  • AutoHotkey decompiler - classic - for AHK 1.0 does not work with password or /nodecompile protected files.

    • Tools

    Integrated Development Environment

  • AHK Studio - SciLexer.dll based IDE for AutoHotkey.
  • AutoHotFlow - Draw your applications. Forum thread: link. GitHub linkstars43.
  • DRAKON Editor - Visual programming (with DRAKON diagrams) for AutoHotkey.
  • Notepad++ for AutoHotkey - Setup for popular code editor Notepad++ for AutoHotkey.

    • Tools

    GUI WYSIWYG Builders

  • GUI Creator (formerly Basic GUI Creator) - WYSIWYG GUI Creator for AutoHotkey.

    • Tools

    Script Recorders and Writers

  • Pulover’s Macro Creator - a Free Automation Tool and Script Generator. Recommended for beginners. Forum thread: link. GitHub linkstars848.

    • Tools

    Web Syntax Highlighters

  • PrismJs - Lightweight minimal AutoHotkey syntax highlighting.

    • Tools

    Others

  • GoTo - Addon for any text editor that helps you jump to labels, hotkeys, hotstrings and functions in the active file.
  • Context sensitive help in any editor - Addon for any text editor that provides context sensitive help by pressing F1.
  • CodeQuickTester - by GeekDude - A lightweight dynamic code tester.

    • Tools

    (Use in) other programming languages

  • .NET Framework Interop (CLR, C#, VB) - Forum thread: link.
  • ActiveScript - Host VBScript and JScript in-process - Provides an interface to Active Scripting languages like VBScript and JScript, without relying on Microsoft's ScriptControl, which is not available to 64-bit programs.
  • Exo-Javascriptstars100 - Write AHK with JavaScript - Forum thread: link, Exo-CLI (Interactive Command-line) linkstars9.
  • Machine code functions: Bit Wizardry - Tutorial link, C/C++ to MCode Generator forum link.
  • Embed Perl - Forum thread: link.

    • Tutorials

    Classes

  • Classes in AHK, Basic tutorial - AutoHotkey classes basic tutorial.
  • Classes in AHK, a Dissection (Advanced) - AutoHotkey classes advanced tutorial.

    • Tutorials

    GUI

  • Use HTML and CSS for your GUIs! - Using HTML and CSS for creating GUIs.

    • Tutorials

    MCode (machine code)

  • MCode Tutorial - MCode (machine code) tutorial.

    • Resources

    Documentation

  • Official documentation - Official uptodate AutoHotkey documentation. GitHub linkstars196.

    • Resources

    Books

  • ahkbook - a book on AutoHotkey (not completed yet). Forum thread: link.

    • Resources

    Quick-start guides

  • Official quick start tutorial - Official quick start tutorial - originally written by tidbit. Forum thread: link.

    • Resources

    Websites

  • autohotkey.com - Official website of the AutoHotkey scripting language (downloads, forum, documentation).

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Dec 7th - Dec 13th, 2015
item.description:
Scripts

Window Management

  • WindowSaverstars32 - Save and restore window layouts in Windows10 with support for virtual desktops and changing monitor setups. WindowSaver is an enhancement of DockWin v0.3 by Paul Troiano

    • Tools

    GUI WYSIWYG Builders

  • AutoGUI - by alguimist - WYSIWIG GUI Designer and Script Editor

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2015
item.description:
Tools

Web Syntax Highlighters

  • highlight.js - A syntax highlighter written in JavaScript supporting more than 130 languages (including AutoHotkey).

    • Tools

    Debugging

  • Yunitstars28 - by Uberi and infogulch - Simple unit testing framework for AutoHotkey.

    • Scripts

    Mouse

  • MouseGestureL - Control applications by mouse gestures. Gestures and actions can be defined via customizable interface. Documentation in English and Japanese - Japanese Homepage link

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2015
item.description:
Scripts

Window Management

  • NiftyWindows - control of all basic window interactions such as dragging, resizing, maximizing, minimizing, closing, snap-to-grid, "keep window aspect ratio", rolling up a window to its title bar, transparency control.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2015
item.description:
Library Distributions

  • ASPDMstars54 - package/stdlib distribution and management from the ahkscript folks. Trello link.
  • pAHKlightstars31 - Your Lightweight Guide to AutoHotkey libraries, classes, functions and tools.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2015
item.description:
Resources

Websites

  • ahkscript GitHub organization - Official ahkscript GitHub organization.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2015
item.description:
Tools

Interpreter

  • IronAHKstars368 - Cross platform .NET rewrite - unfinished.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Feb 23rd - Mar 1st, 2015
item.description:
Tools

Integrated Development Environment

  • SublimeAutoHotkeystars189 - AutoHotkey AHK language package for SublimeText including syntax highlighting, comments toggling, auto-completions, build system definitions, commands for ahkrun, ahkcompile, ahkrunpiped.

    • Tools

    Web Syntax Highlighters

  • Syntax Highlighterstars6 - Legacy syntax highlighter for AutoHotkey with default support for line numbers.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Nov 24th - Nov 30th, 2014
item.description:
Library Distributions

  • ahk-libsstars126 - Ryan Shipp's collection of libraries.

item.title: ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey Aug 4th - Aug 10th, 2014
item.description:
Tools

Integrated Development Environment

  • SciTE4AutoHotkey - SciTE-based IDE for AutoHotkey.
